title: TC-001: Charge Stand Name & Image Display in Software Tab — Powered State
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to Poly Studio Mobile app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry (name and image) in the Software tab.
expected: Charge Stand is displayed in the Software tab with correct product name (e.g., 'Charge Stand') and correct product image/icon. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: If the bug is present, the Charge Stand entry may show a generic/blank name or missing image even when powered.

title: TC-002: Charge Stand Name & Image Display in Software Tab — Unplugged Transition (Stay on Screen)
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Verify Charge Stand entry is displayed correctly (name + image).
While remaining on the Software tab, unplug the Charge Stand from power.
Observe the Charge Stand entry immediately after unplugging.
expected: After unplugging, the Charge Stand entry should still display the correct product name and image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION (Anti-Regression): Expected: Charge Stand name and image remain correct. Actual (If Bug): Charge Stand name becomes blank/garbled or image disappears/reverts to default placeholder when power is removed.

title: TC-003: Charge Stand Name & Image Display in Software Tab — Unplugged → Replugged Cycle
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Verify Charge Stand entry is displayed correctly.
Unplug Charge Stand from power — observe display.
Replug Charge Stand into power — observe display.
expected: Unplugged: Charge Stand name and image remain correct (no blank/garbled text, no missing image). Replugged: Charge Stand name and image remain correct. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: The display should not corrupt or reset on either transition.

title: TC-004: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — Navigate Away and Back After Unplugging
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab. Verify Charge Stand entry is correct.
Unplug Charge Stand from power.
Navigate away: tap back to Device Settings main screen.
Navigate back to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry.
expected: After navigating back to the Software tab post-unplug, the Charge Stand entry displays the correct product name and image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: Expected: Name and image persist correctly. Actual (If Bug): Name is blank/garbled or image is missing after re-navigation.

title: TC-005: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — App Kill and Relaunch After Unplugging
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab. Verify Charge Stand entry is correct.
Unplug Charge Stand from power.
Immediately force-kill the app (swipe from recents).
Relaunch app, reconnect to headset.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry.
expected: After app kill and relaunch (with Charge Stand unplugged), the Charge Stand entry displays the correct product name and image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: The accessory info should be loaded correctly from the headset's state, not from a stale power-state-dependent cache.

title: TC-006: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — Bluetooth Disconnect/Reconnect After Unplugging
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab. Verify Charge Stand entry is correct.
Unplug Charge Stand from power.
Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off headset or BT on phone).
Reconnect Bluetooth and re-establish app connection.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry.
expected: After Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle with Charge Stand unplugged, the Charge Stand entry displays the correct product name and image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: The accessory info should survive a full BT re-pairing and re-query of device capabilities.

title: TC-007: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — Immediate State Trigger (Change Power While on Different Screen)
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset and plugged into power.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab. Verify Charge Stand entry is correct.
Navigate away to a different screen (e.g., Audio Settings).
Unplug Charge Stand from power.
Immediately navigate back to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry.
expected: Charge Stand entry displays correct product name and image after unplugging while on a different screen and returning. 🧠 IMMEDIATE STATE TRIGGER: The UI should correctly reflect the accessory state even when the power transition occurs off-screen.

title: TC-008: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — No Charge Stand Connected (Negative Test)
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. No Charge Stand connected to headset.
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Software tab contents.
expected: No Charge Stand entry is displayed in the Software tab. Only the headset firmware information is shown. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: The app should not show a phantom/empty Charge Stand entry when no accessory is attached.

title: TC-009: Charge Stand Display in Software Tab — Charge Stand Connected but Unpowered from Start
steps: Precondition: Headset connected to app. Charge Stand connected to headset but NOT plugged into power (unpowered from the beginning).
Navigate to: Device Settings → Software tab.
Observe the Charge Stand entry.
expected: Charge Stand is displayed in the Software tab with correct product name and image even when initially unpowered. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: The accessory info should be based on the accessory being connected/paired, not on its power state.
